title: TAM Cobblemon Bridge
description: Cobblemon compatibility bridge for True Adaptive Music
body:
This mod adds compatibility for Cobblemon in True Adaptive Music by adding a PokeBattle predicate type and OnPokeBattleVictory event type.

When combined with the True Adaptive Music and Cobblemon mods, you will be able to have specific music play for battles depending on whether you are fighting a trainer, wild pokemon, or a legendary. You can also have specific music play whenever you win a battle.
